docket_entries.description: PETITION FOR CHANGE OF NAME FILED BY PETITIONER LARIONI, KRISTEN MARIE JUDICIAL COUNCIL CIVIL CASE COVER SHEET FILED
MINI-MINUTES FOR JAN-21-2003 9:00 AM FOR DEPT 218
DECREE CHANGING NAME TO CALA MARIE LARIONI FILED BY PETITIONER LARIONI, KRISTEN MARIE
ORDER TO SHOW CAUSE FOR CHANGE OF NAME FILED BY PETITIONER LARIONI, KRISTEN MARIE HEARING SET FOR JAN-21-2003 AT 09:00 AM IN DEPT 218

THIS CAUSE CAME ON REGULARLY FOR CHANGE OF NAME. PETITIONER KRISTEN MARIE LARIONI WAS SWORN AND EXAMINED. THE COURT GRANTS DECREE CHANGING PETITIONER'S NAME TO CALA MARIE LARIONI. DECREE SIGNED AND FILED IN OPEN COURT. JUDGE A. JAMES ROBERTSON II, CLERK: V. MU; REPORTER: KAREN FARNSWORTH, #5162. (503)

calendar.matters:
ORDER TO SHOW CAUSE FOR CHANGE OF NAME
Off Calendar Jan-21-2003 Text Ruling
MINI MINUTES: This cause came on regularly for change of name. Judge A. James Robertson II, Clerk: V. Mu; Reporter: Karen Farnsworth, #5162. Petitioner Kristen Marie Larioni was sworn and examined. The Court grants Decree changing Petitioner's name to Cala Marie Larioni. Decree signed and filed in open court. (503)
